description: Structured record produced by the shadow resolution adapter for each claim. v1.1 adds legacy_mapping_version and explicit normalization_priority references.

source_field_for_dimension.description: Which field was used to derive claim_dimension. See normalization_priority.

source_field_for_scope.description: Which field was used to derive scope. See normalization_priority.

normalization_rule_id.description: Rule ID from normalization priority table that produced this resolution. E.g. R003_explicit, R003_legacy_v1, R003_abstain, R006_explicit, R006_legacy_v1, R006_default.

legacy_mapping_version.description: Version tag of the legacy mapping rule when fallback_used is true (e.g. 'v1', 'v2'). Nil when no fallback used.

fallback_used.description: True if a fallback (heuristic) was used instead of explicit field.

abstain_reason.description: None if resolved, string reason if quarantined (e.g. 'no_claims', 'ambiguous_dimension').

canonical_entity.description: Currently mirrors surface_entity. Future: entity-resolution pipeline.

claim_dimension.description: Normalized dimension. See dimension normalization priority.

scope.description: Normalized scope. See scope normalization priority.

adjudication_key.description: Composite key: {canonical_entity}:{claim_dimension}:{scope|_default_}. Used by ShadowLifecycleAdjudicator for relationship determination.

lifecycle_ref.description: surface_entity:dimension combination used as lifecycle identifier.

normalization_priority_version.description: Version of the normalization priority rules used.

dimension_normalization_steps.description: Trace of normalization steps applied, in priority order.

scope_normalization_steps.description: Trace of normalization steps applied, in priority order.

priority.description: claim type/predicate field (not yet in phase05_v3)

priority.behavior: Use with fallback_used=true, legacy_mapping_version=v1. Only when no explicit field. versioned audit trail only.

priority.description: claim_id third segment heuristic, only when segment is semantic (non-numeric, non-version-like)
priority.behavior: Use with fallback_used=true, legacy_mapping_version=v1. Numeric/version-like segments (digits, digits+s, version strings) fall through to R006_default.

priority.description: _default_ for sequential progression or absence of semantic scope
priority.behavior: Use _default_. Safe for single-track lifecycle progression.
